title: Pungent Pull Apart Spanish Cheese Paella
description: A one-pot Spanish dish featuring whole wheat, ferment, and a blend of cheeses, perfect for a diabetic-friendly meal option.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
Heat the olive oil in a large paella pan or skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the smoked paprika and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the fermented garlic and cook for an additional minute, stirring constantly.
Add the whole wheat paella rice and cook for 2 minutes, stirring constantly, until the rice is lightly toasted.
Add the chicken broth, salt, and black pepper, and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low, cover, and simmer for 20 minutes, or until the liquid is absorbed and the rice is tender.
Stir in the manchego and parmesan cheese until melted and well combined.
Transfer the paella pan to the preheated oven and bake for 10 minutes, or until the top is lightly browned and the cheese is melted and bubbly.
Remove from the oven and let cool for 5 minutes before serving.
